category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a database migration tool; GitHub README describes Dbmate as a framework-agnostic database migration tool.
display_name_sources: GitHub README heading uses Dbmate; source_facts.name is dbmate.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains installation, commands, usage, and migration concepts.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/amacneil/dbmate; per instructions repo was not rechecked.
tags_sources: GitHub README lists CLI commands, plain SQL migrations, and support for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, and ClickHouse; current_curation.tags includes cli.
